name: Foley Wines Limited
summary: Foley Wines Limited, an integrated wine company, produces, markets, and sells wines in New Zealand. It offers wines under the Martinborough Vineyard, Te Kairanga, Lighthouse Gin, Grove Mill, Vavasour, and Mt Difficulty brands. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Foley Family Wines Limited and changed its name to Foley Wines Limited in December 2018. Foley Family Wines Limited was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Blenheim, New Zealand. Foley Wines Limited is a subsidiary of Foley Family Wines Holdings, New Zealand Limited.
